meta.title: AI resources for professionals — Cercle IA
meta.description: Guides, templates and practical resources for using AI in your profession. Selected and tested by Cercle IA for professionals.
meta.ogImageAlt: AI resources for professionals — Cercle IA

hero.title: Practical resources to take action.
hero.description: Guides, prompt templates, tool comparisons and training modules. Selected and tested for professionals in law, consulting, healthcare and management.

items.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
items.desc: The fundamentals for using ChatGPT effectively in a professional context. Settings, best practices and use cases.

items.title: Anonymise your data before using AI
items.desc: A practical protocol for processing sensitive data with AI without compromising your clients' confidentiality.

items.title: Choose the right AI tool for each task
items.desc: Comparison of the main AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity) for each type of professional assignment.

items.title: Prompts for lawyers and legal professionals
items.desc: 15 tested prompts for case law research, document drafting and contract analysis.

items.title: Prompts for consultants
items.desc: 12 prompts for sector research, deliverable synthesis and report writing.

items.title: Prompts for executives
items.desc: 10 prompts for strategic analysis, internal communications and decision-making.

items.title: Prompts for HR professionals
items.desc: 14 prompts for recruitment, job posting writing, interviews and HR communications.

tools.title: The tools we use and recommend
tools.description: Selected and tested by our trainers. Updated regularly.

items.name: ChatGPT
items.desc: The most versatile model for writing, analysis and research. The essential starting point.

items.name: Claude
items.desc: Excellent for long texts, nuance and reasoning. Particularly suited to complex analytical tasks.

items.name: Perplexity
items.desc: An AI-powered search engine. Ideal for monitoring, source research and document summaries.

items.name: Gemini
items.desc: Google's model, integrated into the Workspace ecosystem. Relevant if you use Gmail, Docs and Sheets.

items.name: Cercle GPT
items.desc: Our platform: access all AI models from a single, secure interface designed for professionals.

items.name: Otter.ai
items.desc: Automatic transcription and summarisation of meetings and interviews. Immediate time saving on note-taking.
